Title: Yamucha shisu! Osoru beshi Saibaiman
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Toshio Furukawa, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: The Z Senchi and the Saiyajin agree to fight a series of one on one matches, and Tenshinhan and Yamucha fight the first two Saibaiman while their friends watch helplessly on TV; Son Goku races back home as fast as he can; Yajirobe...
